channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Huge offer: Limited-time 40% transfer bonus from Chase to Virgin Atlantic Flying Club
item.description: Act now: Chase is offering a 40% limited-time transfer bonus to Virgin Atlantic Flying Club. Score business-class seats for just 21,000 points.

item.title: TSA officers to work without pay as government (partially) shuts down again
item.description: Well, here we go again. Travelers heading to the airport face a new round of uncertainty after part of the federal government shut down.

item.title: Lola Blankets Are 45 Percent Off This Presidents’ Day Weekend
item.description: From February 14 to 16, these ultra-plush blankets and throws are nearly half off. No exclusions.

item.title: Nothing opens its first retail store in India
item.description: The two-story location will sell products from Nothing and the more affordable, mass-market brand CMF.

item.title: Robot Dogs Are on Going on Patrol at the 2026 World Cup in Mexico
item.description: The Mexican city of Guadalupe, which will host portions of the 2026 World Cup, recently showed off four new robot dogs that will help provide security...

item.title: Gear News of the Week: Samsung Sets a Date for Galaxy Unpacked, and Fitbit’s AI Coach Comes to iOS
item.description: Plus: iOS 26.3 makes it easy to switch to Android, Google cancels the Android 17 beta, and YouTube debuts on the Apple Vision Pro.

item.title: Good News in History, February 14
item.description: 95 years ago today, the horror film Dracula starring Bela Lugosi was released. Adapted from the 1897 novel by Bram Stoker, it’s a tale of Count Dracul...

item.title: Here’s What It’s Like to Use H&R Block’s DIY Tax Service (2026)
item.description: Filing taxes is a pain. Here’s how H&R Block DIY performed against other services I tested.

item.title: Airbnb plans to bake in AI features for search, discovery and support
item.description: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky said the company wants to increase its use of large language models for customer discovery, support and engineering.

item.title: Best Presidents’ Day Mattress Sales of 2026
item.description: Some of the best sales of the year are happening right now—we’ll help you save on our all-time favorite mattresses and bedding.

item.title: Indian pharmacy chain giant exposed customer data and internal systems
item.description: A backend flaw in web admin dashboards used by one of India's largest pharmacy chains, exposed thousands of online pharmacy orders.

item.title: Delta set to unveil massive first-class cabin on its newest planes — but it's temporary
item.description: Delta Air Lines will begin flying an Airbus A321neo with a whopping 44 first-class seats this summer — but it's a temporary solution.

item.title: Ultimate guide to Frontier Miles: How to earn and redeem miles, elite status and more
item.description: Here's how to earn and redeem Frontier miles, maximize the airline's elite status benefits and more.

item.title: Best time to apply for Atmos Rewards cards based on offer history
item.description: The Atmos Rewards cards provide excellent welcome bonuses for Alaska and Hawaiian flyers. When is the best time to apply? Here is their welcome offer ...

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #77
item.description: If the thought of figuring out dinner every night is weighing you down, this week’s meal plan is for you.…

item.title: Monks Arrival After 15 Weeks of Walking Fills DC Streets With Peace and Compassion
item.description: It was a day that some locals said was unlike any other they had ever seen when the party of Buddhist monks arrived barefoot on the steps of the Natio...

item.title: Whiskers on Elephant’s Trunk Are Key to its Amazing Sense of Touch
item.description: The whiskers on an elephant’s trunk are key to its “amazing” sense of touch, reveals new research. The 1,000 hairs that cover the trunk have unusual p...

item.title: Minnesota Tow Truck Driver Returns Abandoned Vehicles to Families After ICE Arrests
item.description: It was only a few months ago that Juan Leon became the proud owner of Minnesota’s newest tow truck service. Not long after, he began to get calls abou...

item.title: Fintech lending giant Figure confirms data breach
item.description: The company said hackers downloaded “a limited number of files” after breaking into an employee’s account. The hacking group ShinyHunters took respons...

item.title: Airbnb says a third of its customer support is now handled by AI in the US and Canada
item.description: Airbnb was poised to introduce an app that doesn't just search for you, but one that "knows you." CEO Brian Chesky said, "It will help guests plan the...

item.title: CA Nonprofit Buys 6,100-acres of Sacred Land, Ending 10-year Battle Over Proposed Sand Mine
item.description: One of the largest private land purchases for conservation in California’s Bay Area was just carried out to save a historic ranch from being turned in...

item.title: How HIV Affects Older Adults Differently
Reasons Why Women Experience Hair Thinning
Exercise Benefits for a Faster Metabolism
item.description: More intense workouts can temporarily raise your metabolic rate. Learn how exercise affects metabolism and which workouts have the greatest impact.

item.title: One Pan Cheeseburger Rice

item.description: Say hello to morning glory muffins, made vegan + gluten-free ! A classic treat originally created by Pam McKinstry in 1978 at her Nantucket restaurant...

item.title: What is considered a “normal meal” in different cultures

item.title: 63 Essential Things to Know Before Visiting Tokyo
item.description: From trains to table manners, these are the lessons Tokyo quietly teaches travellers. They’re practical, cultural, and often invisible until you get t...

item.title: Why lunch is the main meal in some countries
item.description: For many travellers, dinner feels like the main event. It is where expectations concentrate: the moment reserved for something special, social, or mem...

item.title: What grocery stores reveal about how people eat
item.description: A grocery store is one of the most revealing places you can walk into when travelling. More than restaurants or cafés, it shows how people actually ea...

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
U.S. productivity slows down in fourth quarter while unit labor costs accelerate
Beyond to buy rights to Buy Buy Baby brand and reunite it with Bed Bath & Beyond
